name: Maria
top_pain: Last quarter a £1,200 charge nobody could explain for 2 weeks.
top_objection: We already have a corporate Visa from our bank.
ideal_opener: Who's currently approving every expense report, and how long does it take?
closing_move: Two 20-minute slots: Tue 10:00 or Wed 10:30 — which works with your bookkeeper?

signals.content: Filed change-of-registered-office for second Deansgate site (Jan 2026).

name: Tom
top_pain: FX on EU SaaS subscriptions + per-employee card issuance speed.
ideal_opener: I see you closed your Series-B last quarter — how are you handling per-employee card issuance for your new hires?
closing_move: Want me to show you the difference in FX cost vs Brex on your last month's spend? 10 minutes.

signals.content: Announced $18M Series B led by Northzone (Apr 2026).
Filed allotment of shares — Series B confirmation (Apr 2026).

name: Emma
stage: Family-owned · ops head reports to MD · 4-yr tenure
top_pain: Supplier receipts arrive late; accountant re-keys 400+ transactions per month across 3 sites.
top_objection: Our accountant won't deal with another tool.
ideal_opener: How much time does your bookkeeping team spend re-keying supplier receipts every month?
closing_move: Let me set up a 10-minute call with your accountant — we'll walk them through the Sage sync.

name: Lukas
top_pain: Expense fraud last year + multi-currency on Italian supplier deliveries.
top_objection: I don't trust new fintechs with my money.
ideal_opener: I noticed you opened a fourth location in Hamburg last month — how are you handling spend visibility across the 4 sites?
closing_move: Funds are held at a regulated tier-1 partner bank — here's the regulator page. Want a 15-min call where you can ask all the trust questions and then decide?

signals.content: Announced Schwabing opening on Instagram + LinkedIn (Mar 2026).

closing_move: n/a · distractor — reclassify to storefront before pitching.

signals.content: Annual accounts — flat YoY, 1 site only.
